# Warrior Spirit brand provenance

The app identity is partner-specific and remains under `apps/warrior-spirit/`; it is not an Arcane platform asset.

- Product: **Warrior Spirit Companion**
- Tagline: **A Servant's Heart**
- Attribution: **Powered by The Wizard Nexus's PreCrisis.ai**
- Organization source: <https://warriorspirittexas.org/>
- Program source: <https://warriorspirittexas.org/programs>
- Public contact source: <https://warriorspirittexas.org/contact>
- Logo source captured on 2026-07-13: <https://warriorspirittexas.org/_next/static/media/wsLogo.bccd92ab.png>
- Local asset: `img/warrior-spirit-logo.png`

The source website uses fingerprinted deployment URLs, so the app stores a local copy rather than hotlinking it. The logo is used solely for the requested Warrior Spirit partner application. Confirm current brand approval before distributing the app outside the partnership.
